patch.value:
## Context
The bundled package catalog in docs/EXTENSIONS.md (around lines 220-227) mentions only pm-beads, pm-todos, pm-lifecycle-hooks, and pm-search-advanced as exemplars. pm-linked-test-adapters is shipped under packages/ but has zero presence in public docs.

docs/TESTING.md covers pm test / pm test-all / background runs but never mentions that pm install linked-test-adapters --project unlocks run management adapters and reporters.

## Acceptance criteria
- docs/EXTENSIONS.md bundled-package exemplar table/list is complete: all packages/pm-* appear
- docs/TESTING.md mentions pm-linked-test-adapters and what it adds
- pm install linked-test-adapters --project example exists in TESTING.md

## Evidence
packages/pm-linked-test-adapters/package.json (name, description); docs/EXTENSIONS.md lines 220-227; docs/TESTING.md full file — no mention
Document pm-linked-test-adapters package in EXTENSIONS.md and TESTING.md

packages/pm-linked-test-adapters exists as a first-party bundled package (pm-linked-test-adapters, version 0.1.0), but it is not mentioned anywhere in docs/EXTENSIONS.md, docs/TESTING.md, or docs/COMMANDS.md. The EXTENSIONS.md bundled-package catalog lists pm-beads, pm-todos, pm-lifecycle-hooks, pm-search-advanced but omits pm-linked-test-adapters, pm-calendar, pm-templates, and pm-guide-shell from the exemplar list.

- docs/EXTENSIONS.md bundled-package exemplar table/list is complete: all packages/pm-* appear
- docs/TESTING.md mentions pm-linked-test-adapters and what it adds
- pm install linked-test-adapters --project example exists in TESTING.md
